examples: We once watched a red fox attacking a groundhog.
The groundhog Phil emerged from his burrow in Pennsylvania to see his shadow, meaning six more weeks of winter weather.
The Government lost the vote then and it can expect a Groundhog Day next time.
"It is a Groundhog Day Budget from a failing and out-of-touch chancellor, " he said.
Last month, the legendary Pennsylvania groundhog failed to see his shadow, thereby predicting an early spring.
